welcome.paragraph1: Palace Roszkowice is a 19th-century manor house that for decades was the heart of local social and cultural life. Built as a family seat, it combines the elegance of historic architecture with the history of the people who shaped this place.
welcome.paragraph2: Over the years the palace has gone through many phases – from a private residence, through the post-war period of changing uses, to present-day efforts to restore its former character.

onview.heading: Palace today
onview.paragraph1: The palace in Roszkowice is a place of exceptional history that for years has witnessed changing eras and the fortunes of the region. Today it begins a new chapter — with respect for the past and a vision for the future.
onview.paragraph2: We are currently carrying out renovation work aimed at restoring the palace's former splendour and giving it a new purpose. We intend to create a space open to visitors — a place of meetings, culture, and discovering history.
onview.paragraph3: After the renovation is complete, the building will be open to guests, who will be able to tour its interiors, learn about the history of the site, and take part in events inspired by its heritage.
onview.paragraph4: We are working so that we can soon invite you to this exceptional place.
onview.paragraph5: We invite you to follow the progress of the work and discover together the history of the palace in Roszkowice.
